case_title: 100 BUSH CORPORATION VS. LEGEND MERCHANT, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF 100 BUSH CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LEGEND MERCHANT, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 100 BUSH CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEGEND MERCHANT, LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 100 BUSH STREET, SUITE 428, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94104, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60255562)
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF 100 BUSH CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LEGEND MERCHANT, LLC

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LEGEND MERCHANT, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 100 BUSH CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LEGEND MERCHANT, LLC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
